ac: AC1: distill.md exists, Alexander-voiced, conventions, unit=plan
evidence: grep: AskUserQuestion in frontmatter, 'Christopher Alexander' voice, never-bare-ID rule, 'unit of analysis is the whole plan, never a single spec'.
Precondition section: 'Fewer than ~3 substantially-complete specs → STOP' + 'too small / too early to distill' clean exit.

ac: AC3: three cross-plan lenses, simplify reframed cross-plan
evidence: grep: Simplify (plan-as-a-whole), Consolidate/merge, Extract-as-shared-module; simplify-only flagged as 'pass wasn't needed'.
grep: Rule of three + differences, Argue the null case, WET before DRY, Cap the report; edits applied only on approval.
grep: 'You never write it' + foundation-layer changes 'routed back through /foundation'; edits feature specs only.

ac: AC6: Alexander persona documented, whole-plan, Chesterton complement
evidence: ilr-system.md agent model 'Alexander — Reductive Design', unit=plan, reductive complement to Chesterton.

ac: AC7: wired into ilr-system + greenfield-foundations + playbook
evidence: grep: /distill in ilr-system commands table; 'The greenfield flow' section in greenfield-foundations.md; Alexander in playbook roster.

ac: AC8: epic generalization named as out-of-scope
evidence: distill.md 'generalizes to epics — see the epic-distill follow-up'; filed as issue #6.
AC4 counter-pressure baked into proposal generation (rule-of-three, null-case, WET-before-DRY, cap), not just an approval gate.
AC5 single-writer: /distill never writes foundations.md; foundation-layer changes routed through /foundation.

premortem: ceremony on projects too small to need it
evidence: AC2 precondition: <3 substantially-complete specs -> clean 'too small' bail.
AC1/AC3/AC6 anchor Alexander to whole-plan cross-spec analysis; simplify-only pass flagged as unneeded.
AC2 'substantially all spec'd + stable' precondition; pre-build extractions provisional until 2nd usage; re-runnable.
